name: Bubble & Squeak Murder: The Killing of David Jackson
original_name: Bubble & Squeak Murder: The Killing of David Jackson
overview: Two-part true documentary examining the events that led to the murder of 78-year-old former army officer David Jackson by his 66-year-old wife Penny in Somerset on the eve of Valentine's Day 2021.

trailers.title: Bubble & Squeak Murder: The Killing of David Jackson | Trailer | CRIME+INVESTIGATION
